items.user_turn: Please create a detailed day-by-day arrival and handling plan for my Gion Matsuri trip that matches my lodging and arrival times, minimizes time in crowds, lists alternative routes and transit options with estimated durations, and includes packing, medical, and luggage-handling recommendations — I’m arriving July 14 at 16:30 JST on JL123 to Kansai (KIX) and departing July 17 at 10:00 JST on JL128 from Kansai (KIX); lodging reservation GION-RES-872104 at Gion Guesthouse Komorebi, 10 Gionmachi Minamigawa, Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto 605-0074, host phone +81-75-541-0001; medical and mobility: Type 1 diabetes (I use an insulin pump and need refrigeration access with roughly three daily doses), a severe shellfish allergy for which I carry an epinephrine auto-injector, and I can walk moderate distances but prefer continuous walking under 30 minutes; my top priority each day is to see the main parade events while avoiding the densest crowds.
items.task_goal: Create a detailed day-by-day arrival/handling and contingency transit plan for my Gion Matsuri visit that matches my booked lodging and arrival times, minimizes time in crowds, lists alternative routes and transit options (with estimated durations), and includes packing/medical and luggage-handling recommendations.
